description: Street/aggregated analyst consensus estimate for the metric (same units as the metric)
Year-over-year change in the consensus estimate for the metric (percent, 0–100)
Precision of past “beat” predictions over the evaluation window (percent, 0–100)
Combined confidence score derived from multiple model components (0–100)
Historical average error of consensus versus actuals (percent, 0–100)
Boolean flag indicating the row was produced by historical backfill rather than live on Action_Date
Integer days from Action_Date to Earnings_Date (negative if after)
Historical accuracy of the model’s direction (beat/miss) predictions (percent, 0–100)
Confidence that the beat/miss direction relative to consensus is correct (0–100)
Difference between OdinUltra’s historical error and consensus error (negative means the model is more accurate), percent 0–100
Indicates whether OdinUltra's forecast beat consensus estimates
Model forecast minus consensus, as a percent of consensus (0–100)
Average absolute forecast error of the OdinUltra model versus actuals over recent quarters (MAPE), expressed as a percent on a 0–100 scale
Indicates whether OdinUltra's forecast misses consensus estimates
Year-over-year percent change in the model’s forecast for the metric (0–100)
Precision of past “miss” predictions over the evaluation window (percent, 0–100)
Indicates that the OdinUltra Difference with Consensus is larger than OdinUltra's model historical error
Confidence that the forecast magnitude is accurate (0–100)
Model’s point forecast for the specified metric (units depend on the metric)
Count of the last 12 quarters where the company beat consensus
Count of the last 12 quarters where the company missed consensus
Total number of calendar days in the fiscal quarter (integer)
